title: Expose Charlie learning-mode state in Lead Console
summary: Added a dedicated Lead Console panel that surfaces learning-driven delegation mode, trend, score rates, and coaching focus for transparent orchestration control.
changes: Added typed memory-packet view model for learning_context in Lead Console.
Added Learning Delegation Mode panel with mode/trend metrics and coaching focus.
Added mode badge color-coding for quick conservative/balanced/exploratory recognition.
Marked EXP-010g complete in task board.
risks: UI currently reads the latest memory packet snapshot only; rapid backend changes may briefly lag between refresh intervals.
rollback: Remove the learning-mode panel from Lead Console while retaining backend learning integration.
